rationale: The citing paper focuses on reference-dependent extended-warranty decisions (base vs. extended warranty, loss aversion, buy/no-buy and menu-choice models), while the cited paper is about performance-based dealer trade promotions and durability in auto channels. Given this clear construct/method mismatch and only a bare DOI match with no contextual evidence of direct theory, method, or benchmark use, this looks like likely background/domain citation rather than substantive dependence.
